hero.title: Ready for AI?

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.content: We combine deep technical expertise with business acumen to deliver AI solutions that drive real value. From strategy to implementation, we're your trusted partner in the AI journey.

adoptingAI.title: Adopting AI tools
adoptingAI.subtitle: PromptAI helps organisations introduce AI in a way that people can actually adopt.
adoptingAI.description: We work with leadership teams to understand their goals, design practical strategies for introducing AI into the workplace, and deliver training that helps teams build real confidence using AI tools.

buildingCapability.title: Building Capability
buildingCapability.subtitle: Our focus is not just technology. It’s helping people learn how to work effectively with AI.
buildingCapability.description: Through workshops, scenario-based learning and structured adoption programmes, we help organisations move from AI curiosity to real capability.

pillars.missionQuote: We're on a mission to empower people to be on the right side of AI one prompt at a time.
pillars.approachHeading: Long-term relationships built on human trust.
pillars.approachDesc: PromptAI builds deep partnerships to support organisations throughout their AI adoption journey.
pillars.whyDesc: AI can help create environments where people focus on what matters most.

getInTouch.title: Get in Touch

adoptionDeepDive.journeyContent: Introducing AI into an organisation requires more than just tools. It requires strategy, change management and training.
adoptionDeepDive.title: AI Transformation
adoptionDeepDive.content: PromptAI supports organisations across the full AI adoption journey — from early exploration through to workforce training and long-term adoption. Our services include strategy development, adoption planning and hands-on training designed to help teams build real capability.
adoptionDeepDive.trainingSubtitle: Helping teams learn how to use AI in their daily work.
adoptionDeepDive.trainingContent: Our training sessions focus on helping people understand what AI can do and how to use it responsibly. Through practical exercises, participants learn how to use AI tools for research, writing, and analysis.

members.name: Taryn Nixon

hero.title: Case Studies
hero.subtitle: Real results from real clients. See how we've helped organizations transform with AI.

studies.challenge: Scaling AI tools across a fragmented global creative network.
studies.solution: Bespoke AI adoption framework focused on creative workflows and tool governance.
studies.results: 30% increase in productivity for creative operations teams.

studies.challenge: Integrating generative AI into data-heavy analytical environments.
studies.solution: PROSCI-led change management strategy to shift analyst mindsets.
studies.results: Successful rollout to over 5,000 analysts with 85% adoption rate.

studies.challenge: Developing a roadmap for AI-driven mentorship matching.
studies.solution: Behavioural science audit to optimize AI-human interactions in the platform.
studies.results: Improved matching accuracy and user engagement by 40%.

intro.title: Every organisation approaches AI differently. In this section we share examples of our work with organisations exploring AI adoption.
intro.description: These case studies highlight the challenges organisations face, the approaches used to introduce AI and the lessons learned along the way. They demonstrate how organisations move from experimentation to practical use across teams.

hero.title: We're on a mission to make AI accessible
hero.subtitle: Founded by industry veterans, we believe every organization can benefit from AI.

promise.title: Our Promise
promise.content: We combine deep technical expertise with business acumen to deliver AI solutions that drive real value.

ourPhilosophy.title: Our Philosophy
ourPhilosophy.heading: Grounding AI in Humanity.
ourPhilosophy.content: PromptAI was started with a simple belief: the organisations that succeed with AI will be the ones that prioritise people. We focus on the human side of AI adoption, grounded in behavioural science and change management principles.

ourWhy.title: Our Why
ourWhy.content: AI can help create workplaces that are both productive and fulfilling.

globalPartnership.description: PromptAI is a member of the Microsoft AI Cloud Partner Programme, driving enterprise-ready AI solutions.

intro.title: AI is evolving quickly and organisations need to stay informed about how these changes affect the future of work.
intro.subtitle: In the Insights section we explore several key topics that shape the modern workplace:
